title: Goodbye Blind Signing! Ethereum Launches "Clear Signing" to Kill Phishing Scams
subTitle:
The Ethereum Foundation, alongside wallet heavyweights like MetaMask, Ledger, and WalletConnect, has officially rolled out the "Clear Signing" open standard. This initiative introduces a major security upgrade to transaction signing on Ethereum, tackling the industry's biggest vulnerability: Blind Signing.
⚡ What You See Is What You Sign (WYSIWYS)
Right now, approving a transaction means signing an unreadable string of hexadecimal code. If you can't read it, hackers can easily trick you into draining your own wallet as seen in the recent WazirX and Bybit exploits.
The new ERC-7730 standard changes the game by acting as an off-chain translation layer. Instead of code, your wallet will now show plain, human-readable language:
Exactly which assets are leaving your wallet.Exactly who the recipient is.Exactly what smart contract permissions you are granting.
🛡️ The Trillion Dollar Security Registry
To back this up, Ethereum launched a public registry at Clearsigning.org, managed under the Trillion Dollar Security Initiative. Contract descriptions will be submitted here, audited by independent security researchers, and pulled directly into your wallet at the point of signing. The recently released ERC-7730 V2 expands this protection to cross-chain transactions and complex DeFi applications.
🏛️ A New Core Era for Ethereum
This security overhaul lands alongside a massive technical reshuffle at the Ethereum Foundation. On May 12, 2026, a new trio of co-leads Will Corcoran, Kev Wedderburn, and Fredrik Svantes took the reins of the core Protocol Cluster. Their immediate roadmap includes the upcoming Glamsterdam upgrade (aiming for a 200M gas limit and ePBS) followed by Hegotá, signaling a massive leap forward in both UX security and base-layer scaling.

{future}(ETHUSDT)

Will "Clear Signing" finally make crypto safe for retail users? Let us know if you think this ends the era of wallet-draining scams! 👇

🔭 Schwab standardizes cryptocurrency

Schwab stepping into spot trading for BTC and ETH is a bigger signal than the headlines suggest: it pulls cryptocurrency deeper into the conventional brokerage system. This isn't about hype; it's about infrastructure, and infrastructure is how new asset classes become hard to ignore.

🧲 My assessment is mixed but constructive. Bullish case: every familiar entry point reduces friction and expands the potential participant base, especially for those already in Schwab's ecosystem. Bearish case: mere access doesn't breed trust, and the market might misinterpret the launch of services as an immediate new demand.

👁️‍🗨️ The real takeaway is that BTC and ETH are being standardized as tools in the investment portfolio, not just side adventures, and this slow shift is more significant than any single launch.

⚠️ This is just personal analysis. Not financial advice. Do your own thorough research. #BTC  #ETH #crypto

👁️‍🗨️ Điều rút ra thực sự là BTC và ETH đang được chuẩn hóa như các công cụ trong danh mục đầu tư, không phải là những cuộc phiêu lưu phụ, và sự chuyển dịch chậm này quan trọng hơn bất kỳ lần ra mắt đơn lẻ nào.

title: Why Traders Are Watching The May 14 CLARITY Act Hearing Closely
subTitle:
Crypto traders are not just watching charts this week…

They’re watching Washington.

On May 14, lawmakers are expected to review the highly anticipated CLARITY Act — a bill that could finally define how crypto is regulated in the United States.

And the market knows this could change everything.

For years, crypto has operated inside regulatory uncertainty.

Projects didn’t know whether tokens would be classified as securities.

Exchanges faced growing pressure from regulators.

Investors feared lawsuits, restrictions, and sudden enforcement actions.

That uncertainty kept a large amount of institutional money on the sidelines.

The CLARITY Act aims to change that.

The bill is designed to create official rules for digital assets and clearly separate authority between the SEC and CFTC. For many investors, this could become the first real step toward a stable legal framework for crypto in America.

That’s why May 14 is being watched so closely.

If the hearing moves positively, many traders believe institutional capital could enter the market far more aggressively.

Banks, hedge funds, pension funds, and major financial firms usually avoid industries without clear regulation. Legal clarity gives institutions confidence to scale exposure.

This is one reason Bitcoin, Ethereum, and major altcoins have already started reacting to growing optimism surrounding the bill.

Another major focus is stablecoins.

One of the most debated topics inside the CLARITY Act is whether companies should be allowed to offer rewards or yield incentives on stablecoin holdings.

Traditional banks are pushing back strongly because stablecoins could compete directly with savings accounts and bank deposits.

Meanwhile, crypto companies argue that excessive restrictions could slow innovation and push blockchain development outside the United States.

This ongoing battle between traditional finance and crypto innovation is one of the biggest reasons the bill faced delays earlier this year.

Now traders believe May 14 could become the turning point.

If lawmakers move closer to agreement and the bill advances, many analysts believe it could unlock a new wave of bullish momentum across the crypto market.

Potential effects include:

Increased institutional adoption
Faster ETF expansion
Reduced fear around SEC lawsuits
More crypto companies operating in the U.S.
Stronger long-term capital flows into Bitcoin and Ethereum

That’s why volatility expectations are rising quickly ahead of the hearing.

Because this is bigger than a normal news headline.

This is about whether the United States finally creates a serious legal framework for digital assets after years of uncertainty.

And if that happens…

the next phase of the crypto bull market could become much larger than most people expect.

#Saga  Last year, when he lost a million, 
 he really broke down. 
 He smashed his phone, deleted apps, and didn't touch the market for two months. 
 He said at that time, it felt like the crypto scene had completely hit a dead end. 
 But what truly hurt was not the losses, 
 #ETH  but the unwillingness to accept it. 
 At the beginning of this year, he only had 3400U left in his account. 
 The first thing he asked me was: 
 "Can I bounce back?" 
 Nobody expected that 
 with just this little principal, he later compounded it. 
 10k, 50k, 120k... 
 Not only did he recover all his previous losses, 
 but he also made over 500k profit in the end. 
 Many people think this was just luck. 
 But the real factors behind his comeback were actually three things: 
 First, never go all in. 
 Keep a single position under 40%, 
 cut losses at 15% immediately. 
 Survive first, then you have a chance later. 
 Second, only follow the trend. 
 Go long in uptrends, short in downtrends. 
 Don't try to catch the top or bottom. 
 Those who ride the trend will always go further than gamblers. 
 Third, layer your profits. 
 Take only 30% of what you earn to continue compounding, 
 and withdraw the rest without hesitation. 
 Because true experts 
 are not the ones who make the craziest profits, 
 but those who can keep their profits. 
 Over the years, I've found that: 
 many people lack not the skills, 
 but a set of discipline, 
 and someone who can guide them out of the lows. 
 The market has already started to move. 
 New opportunities are brewing. 
 This time, don't just be a bystander. 🔥

content:
#Saga 去年亏掉100万的时候，
他真的崩了。
砸手机、删软件、两个月不碰盘。
他说那时候感觉，币圈这条路已经彻底走到头了。
可真正让人难受的，
不是亏钱，
#ETH 而是不甘心。
今年年初，他账户里只剩3400U。
找到我的第一句话就是：
“还能翻身吗？”
谁也没想到，
就是这点本金，后来一路滚仓。
1万、5万、12万……
不仅把之前亏掉的钱全部赚回来，
最后还多赚了50多万。
很多人觉得这是运气。
但真正让他翻盘的，其实只有三件事：
第一，绝不满仓。
单笔仓位不超过40%，
亏损15%立刻止损。
先活下来，才有后面的机会。
第二，只跟趋势。
上涨做多，下跌做空。
不猜顶，不抄底。
顺势的人，永远比赌徒走得远。
第三，利润分层。
赚到的钱，只拿30%继续滚仓，
剩下的坚决提现。
因为真正的高手，
从来不是赚得最疯的人，
而是能把利润留下来的人。
这些年我发现：
很多人缺的根本不是技术，
而是一套纪律，
和一个能带他走出低谷的人。
行情已经开始异动。
新的机会，也正在酝酿。
这一次，别再只做看客了。🔥

title: CPI 之後，市場真正要重新定價的不是一根 K 線，而是降息路徑。
subTitle:
美國 4 月 CPI 同比升至 3.8%，核心 CPI 同比 2.8%。更關鍵的是，核心通膨仍有黏性，能源和住房也繼續推高通膨預期。
這代表什麼？
如果通膨預期重新抬頭，Fed 就更難快速轉向降息。市場原本交易的是「利率快要鬆了」，但 CPI 數據出來後，邏輯會變成：
降息時間繼續後移美債實際收益率維持高位美元流動性不容易快速放鬆風險資產估值要重新承壓
所以這不是單純的「CPI 利空 BTC」，而是宏觀流動性沒有給 crypto 一個舒服的上漲環境。
對 BTC 來說，8 萬附近能不能穩住，不能只看技術位，還要看 ETF 和現貨資金有沒有繼續接。
對 ETH 和山寨來說，壓力會更明顯，因為它們更依賴流動性擴張和風險偏好回升。
我的判斷：
CPI 沒有直接終結行情，但它會延長震盪時間。BTC 還可以觀察資金承接，山寨暫時不適合無差別追漲。現在更重要的是等市場確認：到底是真資金回流，還是只是槓桿反彈。
風險提示：以上僅為市場研究和個人觀察，不構成投資建議。
#BTC  #ETH  #CPI  #Fed  #加密市場

translatedData.title: Post-CPI, what the market really needs to reprice isn’t just a single candlestick, but the path of rate cuts.
translatedData.subTitle:
The US April CPI rose year-on-year to 3.8%, with core CPI at 2.8%. More crucially, core inflation remains sticky, with energy and housing continuing to drive up inflation expectations.
What does this mean?
If inflation expectations rise again, the Fed will find it harder to pivot to rate cuts quickly. The market was initially trading on the notion that 'rates were about to loosen', but after the CPI data dropped, the logic shifts to:
The timing of rate cuts continues to be pushed back.
Real yields on US treasuries remain elevated.
Dollar liquidity isn’t going to ease quickly.
Risk asset valuations will face renewed pressure.
So this isn’t just a simple 'CPI bearish for BTC', but rather that macro liquidity isn’t providing crypto with a comfortable uptrend environment.

title: Ниже приведен краткий обзор ключевых показателей и событий дня 12.05.26
subTitle:
Вчера, 12 мая 2026 года, крипторынок показал смешанную динамику с небольшим преобладанием «бычьих» настроений, несмотря на давление со стороны данных по инфляции в США.

📊 Состояние основных активов
• Bitcoin (BTC): Удерживался выше психологической отметки в $80 000. В течение дня цена колебалась в диапазоне $80 463 – $82 137. К вечеру BTC торговался в районе $80 754 (-0,20% за сутки).
• Ethereum (ETH): Продемонстрировал небольшое снижение, торгуясь около $2 285 (-2,17%).
• Лидеры роста: Настоящий фурор произвел токен GTC, взлетевший на 89%. Также в топе оказались OSMO (+67%) и Saga (+52%).
• Аутсайдеры: Сильнее всего просели ACA (-51%) и DEGO (-50%).
🔑 Главные новости дня
1.	Инфляция в США: Опубликованные данные по CPI оказались выше ожиданий. Это охладило надежды на скорое снижение ставки ФРС, что вызвало кратковременную просадку рисковых активов, включая крипту.
2.	Эмиссия USDT: Казначейство Tether напечатало 1 млрд USDT, что традиционно воспринимается рынком как приток ликвидности для будущих покупок.
3.	Ripple (XRP): Монета показала силу, удерживаясь выше сопротивления в $1,45 на фоне новостей о привлечении компанией Ripple $200 млн для развития институционального бизнеса.
4.	Годовщина Terra: 12 мая сообщество вспоминало 4 года с момента краха экосистемы Terra (LUNA), что добавило нотку осторожности в рыночные дискуссии.
Краткий итог: Рынок находится в фазе консолидации. Bitcoin успешно защищает уровень $80k, но для дальнейшего рывка вверх ему нужны более позитивные макроэкономические новости.
Обратите внимание: как ИИ, я не могу «сфотографировать» монитор в реальном времени, но описанные данные полностью отражают визуальную картину графиков на вчерашний день #BinanceOnline #BTC #ETH #USDT #Ripple
